'''鈭歵-j-ng-w''' ('''katajngewoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:turban|turban]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-j-ng-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:turban|turban]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歵-j-ng-w
|-
! Lemma
| katajngewoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thitajngewoko|thitajngewoko]] || [[word:jitajngewoko|jitajngewoko]] || [[word:shitajngewoko|shitajngewoko]] || [[word:kitajngewoko|kitajngewoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthutajngewoko|thuthutajngewoko]] || [[word:jujutajngewoko|jujutajngewoko]] || [[word:shushutajngewoko|shushutajngewoko]] || [[word:kukutajngewoko|kukutajngewoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thotajngewoko|thotajngewoko]] || [[word:jotajngewoko|jotajngewoko]] || [[word:shotajngewoko|shotajngewoko]] || [[word:kotajngewoko|kotajngewoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thotajngewoko|thotajngewoko]] || [[word:jotajngewoko|jotajngewoko]] || [[word:shotajngewoko|shotajngewoko]] || [[word:kotajngewoko|kotajngewoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙tajngewoko|th忙tajngewoko]] || [[word:j忙tajngewoko|j忙tajngewoko]] || [[word:sh忙tajngewoko|sh忙tajngewoko]] || [[word:k忙tajngewoko|k忙tajngewoko]]
|-

|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thatajngewoko|thatajngewoko]] || [[word:jatajngewoko|jatajngewoko]] || [[word:shatajngewoko|shatajngewoko]] || [[word:katajngewoko|katajngewoko]]
|-

|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
